tagline: Native blooms with excellent neighborhood manners.

hero.title: BloomRoute pollinator garden hero image
hero.alt: A garden designer planting colorful native flowers in a sunny front-yard pollinator garden.

contact.serviceArea: Front-yard beds, sidewalk strips, cottage gardens, and sunny corners across the river neighborhoods and nearby suburbs

copy.eyebrow: Pollinator garden refreshes with color and manners
copy.heroText: BloomRoute refreshes front-yard beds with native flowers, soft grasses, tidy edges, and planting plans that make bees happy without making your walkway disappear.
copy.introTitle: Pretty, useful, and not secretly chaos.
copy.introText: We blend pollinator-friendly plants with clean edging, seasonal color, and practical maintenance notes so your garden feels lush on purpose.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready for a bed that buzzes politely?
copy.quoteText: Send a few photos, sun exposure, bed dimensions, and what is already growing. We will suggest a native-forward refresh plan with color, timing, and a simple install path.

services.title: Sunny native color
services.text: Coneflower, black-eyed Susan, salvia, and grasses arranged for long bloom windows and tidy curb appeal.

services.title: Pocket pollinator beds
services.text: Small front-yard corners, mailbox beds, and sidewalk strips refreshed with plants that earn their square footage.

services.title: Seasonal soft reset
services.text: We edit tired plants, add texture, refresh mulch, and make the whole bed look intentional again.

process.title: Read the site
process.text: We check sun, soil, existing plants, water access, and how polished or wild you want the bed to feel.

process.title: Map the bloom route
process.text: You get a simple plant mix, color rhythm, maintenance notes, and install timing.

process.title: Refresh the bed
process.text: We plant, edge, mulch, water in, and leave the care notes so the garden keeps the plot.

proof.label: color plans for spring through fall
